extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports proceedings against the Company, subsidiaries, promoters and directors separately from proceedings by those parties. I counted only the against rows: criminal cases are Nil across the Company, subsidiaries, promoters and directors; statutory/regulatory actions are also Nil across those against rows; tax proceedings against the Company are 2 and against subsidiaries are Nil, while all By rows were excluded. The quantified aggregate against the Company and subsidiaries is the stated Company-against total of ₹19.16 million, with subsidiaries Nil; converted at ₹10 million per crore, this equals ₹1.916 crore. No contingent-liabilities table or total is disclosed in the provided risk section. The company-wide top-10 customer concentration is 59.99% of revenue from operations for Fiscal 2021; no company-wide top-5 percentage is provided, and segment/geographic concentrations were not used. Litigation amounts use ₹ million as the source unit, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
